goals: Configure stock monitoring for personal investment portfolio including major tech and healthcare stocks
Set up price alert thresholds for significant price movements
Verify the monitoring system is working by checking current stock prices

user_agent_config.personality: Organized and detail-oriented, prefers clear instructions and systematic approaches. Wants practical tools to manage personal investments alongside busy work schedule.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Not familiar with financial APIs or command-line tools; describes needs in plain language and relies on assistant to configure the system properly.

end_condition: User has configured stock monitoring for their portfolio, understands how alerts work, and confirms the system is set up correctly for ongoing price monitoring.
